creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 249307
py-netaddr-1.2.1.patch

Hi Moin,

attached is a patch that updates net/py-netaddr to 1.2.1.

Changes to the port:
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
- Switch to the PEP517 build framework.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere -> OK (13.2-RELEASE amd64 py38, py39, py310, py311)


Results of "make test" (for py38, py39, py310, py311):
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
> ==== 339 passed, 1 skipped in N.NNs ====
